6.reason: [Using gets() is unsafe and deprecated; causes compilation error in modern compilers due to removal from standard library]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Using gets() is unsafe and deprecated; causes compilation error in modern compilers due to removal from standard library]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard library since C11; using it may cause compilation errors or warnings depending on compiler settings.]

14.reason: [This ternary modifies str[i] but doesn't handle string termination correctly; also logic flaw in shifting digits]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This ternary modifies str[i] but doesn't handle string termination correctly; also logic flaw in shifting digits]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This ternary expression modifies 'str[i]' but does not handle string termination correctly when '\0' is assigned, potentially leading to undefined behavior or incorrect output. Also, shifting digits in-place like this corrupts the original string structure needed for further processing.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This ternary expression modifies 'str[i]' but does not handle string termination correctly when '\0' is assigned, potentially leading to undefined behavior or incorrect output. Also, shifting digits in-place like this corrupts the original string structure needed for further processing.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This ternary expression modifies 'str[i]' but does not handle the rest of the string correctly for scientific notation; also, after setting str[i] to '\0', strlen(str) becomes unreliable in subsequent loops.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This ternary expression modifies 'str[i]' but doesn't handle string termination correctly when '\0' is assigned, potentially causing undefined behavior or incorrect output. Also, shifting digits manually like this is error-prone.]

28.reason: [Missing printing of the normalized base part before 'e'; only prints exponent]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Missing printing of the normalized base part before 'e'; only prints exponent]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This prints only the exponent without printing the normalized base part (e.g., "1.23"), resulting in incomplete scientific notation output.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This prints only the exponent without printing the normalized base (mantissa), violating the output format requirement which mandates a base followed by 'e' and the exponent.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This prints only the exponent without printing the normalized base (e.g., "1.23"), violating the output format requirement.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This prints only the exponent without printing the normalized base (mantissa), violating the output format requirement. The base part is missing entirely for numbers not starting with '0'.]
